empty: I couldn't find readable text in that image.
The OCR scan did not detect any text.
path_missing: I need a local image path before I can run OCR.
There was no image path to scan.
not_found: I couldn't find the image at %path%.
That OCR target path does not exist: %path%.
dependency_missing: OCR dependencies are not installed in this environment.
pytesseract or Pillow is missing, so OCR is unavailable right now.
